Theme status

8 themes (1 incubating · 7 shipping) · auto-regenerated by bin/build-theme-status.py after every check.yml run.

  • green = pass / healthy / <=7d
  • yellow = warn / <=30d / review needed
  • red = fail / >30d / unreachable
  • grey = unknown / skipped / n/a
Theme StageBoot smokeBaseline ageMicrocopy distinctImages uniqueVision reviewed Owner Summary
aeroshippingunknown0.5dpasspassneedednickY2K iridescent WooCommerce block theme: holographic pastels, glassy chrome buttons, sparkle product cards, and a bubbly wordmark for soft-future storefronts.
basaltshippingunknown0.0dpasspassneedednickEditorial WooCommerce block theme with hairline borders, generous whitespace, and a warm cream palette; a sibling register to Basalt.
chonkshippingunknown0.5dpasspassneedednickNeo-brutalist WooCommerce block theme: cream backgrounds, pure black 4px borders, hard offset shadows, chunky display type, zero rounded corners.
foundryshippingunknown0.5dpasspassneedednickEditorial WooCommerce block theme with hairline borders, generous whitespace, and a warm cream palette; a sibling register to Obel.
lysholmshippingunknown0.5dpasspassneedednickNordic home-goods WooCommerce block theme: pale cream surfaces, soft tan accents, unhurried serif typography for slow, considered storefronts.
obelshippingunknown0.5dpasspassneedednickEditorial WooCommerce block theme with hairline borders, generous whitespace, and a warm cream palette for quiet, measured storefronts.
selvedgeshippingunknown0.5dpasspassneedednickWorkwear-heritage WooCommerce block theme: warm dark palette, italic display serif, small-batch maker's voice for goods built to outlast you.
azulejoincubatingbootsnonepasspassn/anickazulejo: WIP (first-5 batch retrofit). Edit this summary with the theme's brand voice once the design pass is complete.
